episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

1.premise: Period fingering could be reframed as gang-sign initiation because both end with blood-red bent fingers.
Childhood bedwetting during nightmares implies a scary dream, but reveals childhood sexual abuse.
"Roll your R's" sounds like "rape", and "rape" fits because the uncle who taught it was abusive.
"Touched me here" can mean on my body or in the geographic state of Michigan.

lines.text: dude, my finger goes in like this
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and it comes out like this.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And when I'm done with her, she'll be creep walking away.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: When I was a kid, I used to have nightmares
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And recently I found out I'm a squirter.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I think back to those times I had nightmares
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I'd pee the bed and I realized,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: oh, I was just sleeping next to my uncle.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: The uncle that molested me taught me a lot.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He taught me how to roll my R's
lines.label: setup

lines.text: so that when I got older, I could say, "Rrrr, rape."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I was molested in the state of Michigan.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I've been Miranda Meadows, I'm sorry!
lines.label: fluff
